notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers flies out to right fielder Kerry Carpenter.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Gleyber Torres reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes.

notableEvents.label: Will Benson pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Will Benson flies out sharply to left fielder Matt Vierling.

notableEvents.label: Dane Myers pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Dane Myers singles on a ground ball to right fielder Kerry Carpenter.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: TJ Friedl doubles (4) on a fly ball to center fielder Matt Vierling. TJ Friedl to 3rd. TJ Friedl advances to 3rd, on a fielding error by center fielder Matt Vierling.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones walks. Spencer Torkelson to 3rd. Matt Vierling to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Gleyber Torres reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Gleyber Torres reaches on a fielding error by third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes.

notableEvents.label: Jahmai Jones pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jahmai Jones called out on strikes.

notableEvents.label: Javier Báez GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Tigers challenged (play at 1st), call on the field was upheld: Javier Báez grounds into a double play, third baseman Ke'Bryan Hayes to second baseman Matt McLain to first baseman Sal Stewart. Matt Vierling out at 2nd. Javier Báez out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
